title: DMR: Natural Spawn
description: Makes Dragon Mounts Remastered breeds spawns "naturally"
body:
# Makes [DMR](https://modrinth.com/mod/dmr)'s Dragons spawns _naturally*_ ![A Wild Dragon!](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7ef909af073b857a06792b159629ed7ff9023195.png) ## *Replaces already naturally spawning mobs such as Cow, Pig, Sheep, etc.
Spoiler
Dimension/Environment Dragon Type Replaces Mobs
Overworld - Anywhere Forest, Lush Chicken, Cow, Pig, Sheep, Bee
Overworld - Cold Biomes Ice Dragon Polar Bear, Goat
Overworld - Near Water Water Dragon Turlte, Frog
Overworld - Underground Amethyst, Sculk Axolotl, Bat
Nether Fire, Nether Piglin, Zombified Piglin, Ghast, Hoglin, Magma Cube
End Ghost, Aether Shulker
* 0.5% chance of replacement for all breeds * Overworld Dragons only spawns at night * Player bred animals don't count * 25% chance for a baby to spawn with the parent ### Only the **base mod** Dragons are supported. If you have any question, please join my [Discord](https://discord.gg/atukJ6qJaQ) and we can discuss it. * For [More Dragons](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/dragon-mounts-remastered-more-dragons) support, take a look [here](https://modrinth.com/datapack/dmr-more-dragons-natural-spawn)
